summary: Full domain API implementation and hardening pass for the Flask platform.

fixed: F401 unused imports in base.py, routes/auth.py, catalog.py, communities.py, search_service.py, template_service.py
E741 ambiguous 'l' variable in inventory_service.py (3x) and search_service.py (1x) → renamed to 'layer', 'line', 'entry'
E712 '== True' comparison in inventory_service.py → changed to .is_(True)
E127/E261 continuation indent and inline comment spacing in audit_service.py, content.py
E501 long lines in auth_service.py, community_service.py, search_service.py, template_service.py, user_service.py, rbac.py

auth.password_hashing: bcrypt rounds=12; hash stored Fernet-encrypted at rest via EncryptedText TypeDecorator
auth.session_tokens: secrets.token_hex(32), stored as SHA-256 hash in sessions table
auth.lockout: 5 failed attempts → locked_until = now + 15min; tracked in users.failed_attempts + users.locked_until
auth.role_hierarchy: Administrator(6) > Operations Manager(5) > Moderator(4) > Group Leader(3) > Staff(2) > Member(1)

commission.precedence: category rule > community default rule > system default (6.0%)
commission.idempotency: create_settlement returns (settlement, created: bool); route maps to 201 or 409 both with full body
commission.rate_validation: pre-apply all PATCH fields to local vars, validate, then write to model (prevents dirty-session autoflush hitting DB check constraint)

inventory.fifo: _consume_fifo_layers() consumes CostLayer rows ordered by received_at ASC
inventory.costing_method_lock: DB trigger trg_lot_costing_immutable; also enforced in Python before DB write

messaging.websocket: Flask-SocketIO namespace /ws/messaging; auth via CONNECT frame 'token' field
messaging.sid_map: _sid_user_map populated on connect, cleaned on disconnect — prevents stale user references
messaging.receipt_progression: RECEIPT_STATUS_ORDER dict; ConflictError(status_regression) on backward transition
messaging.redelivery_backoff: retry_count + next_retry_at columns; delay = min(60 * 2^retry_count, 7200) seconds
messaging.ttl: 7 days; expires_at set at send time; redelivery job hard-deletes via cascade

content.sanitization: bleach.clean() with allowed_tags whitelist; strips script/style/onclick etc.
content.versioning: immutable ContentVersion rows; rollback changes current_version pointer only
content.attachments: SHA-256 computed server-side; MIME allowlist (5 types); 25 MB limit; soft-delete + daily cleanup job

templates.schema_evolution: _requires_migration() detects field removal or type change; UnprocessableError if no TemplateMigration record before publish
templates.additive_allowed: New optional fields do NOT require a migration record

observability.correlation_id: X-Correlation-ID header echoed or auto-generated UUID; stored in flask.g; propagated to all log entries
observability.log_format: Structured JSON to data/logs/app.jsonl; fields: timestamp, level, correlation_id, span_id, user_id, method, path, status_code, duration_ms
observability.redacted_keys: password, password_hash, current_password, new_password, body, payout_*
observability.health: GET /health (liveness: db check), GET /health/ready (readiness: db + scheduler)

database.encryption: Fernet symmetric encryption for sensitive columns via EncryptedText TypeDecorator
database.audit_log: Append-only; DB triggers prevent UPDATE/DELETE; action_types: settlement, moderation, inventory, auth, content, template
database.migrations: 3 Alembic migrations: 0001 baseline DDL, 0002 constraints/indexes/triggers, 0003 messaging retry columns

modified: app/services/search_service.py (removed unused datetime imports, renamed l→entry, line breaks)
app/services/template_service.py (removed unused AppError import, line length fixes)
app/websocket.py (fixed _sid_user_map, added disconnect, fixed token auth)
